---
title: "Lecture 21 Quiz: DOM Manipulation using JavaScript"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-21.qmd) | [Week 8 Content](/content/week-08.qmd) | [Lab 6](/labs/lab-06.qmd) | [Home Assignment 3](/assignment/03-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 21 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. A database schema", "B. A browser representation of HTML as objects", "C. A CSS framework", "D. A server log"]
question = "Question 1: What is the DOM in web development?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `getElementById()`", "B. `querySelector()`", "C. `querySelectorAll()`", "D. All of these"]
question = "Question 2: Which APIs can be used to select elements from the DOM?"
answer = 4
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `textContent`", "B. `href`", "C. `appendChild`", "D. `remove()`"]
question = "Question 3: Which property is commonly used to replace the visible text inside an element?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `style.hidden()`", "B. `classList.add()`", "C. `queryStyle()`", "D. `attr.toggle()`"]
question = "Question 4: Which method is used to add a CSS class to an element?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `createElement()`", "B. `setTimeout()`", "C. `JSON.parse()`", "D. `fetch()`"]
question = "Question 5: Which method is used when creating a new DOM node in JavaScript?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
